patchNotes:
[New Content]
 • Hypertime Tracker: Cassandra Cain  (Available on April 9)
 • Cassandra Cain's Legacy Piece: Orphan Blades will be available in the House of Secrets.
 • Superman's Legacy Piece: Solar Recovery Suit will be available in the House of Secrets (can be purchased once Superman's Cape reaches the required star level).

[New Themed Event: Lost Treasures of Krypton] (Available on April 13. Requires War Room Lv. 10)
Kryptonian Ship
• Use Kryptonian Probes to search for and detect Kryptonian materials. Kryptonite and Kryptonian Chests of the same type and tier can be merged, up to the top tier.
• Drag Kryptonite to the fortress to send it and earn Phantom Zone Points. Opening Kryptonian Chests also grants Phantom Zone Points, along with other rare items.
• Reach Phantom Zone Point milestones to claim generous rewards. Points can be exchanged for valuable items in Trade Council.
Fortress of Solitude
Submit Kryptonian Sunstones to unlock milestone rewards and unlock the special skill, Super Speed Merge. Use the skill to instantly upgrade a selected Kryptonite or Kryptonian Chest to the top tier.
Super Friend Gift Exchange
During the event, earn Super Friend Gifts through daily tasks, Coordinated Assaults, Crisis Response, or the Anti-Crime Network. Send gifts to friends or league members, and both of you will receive Super Friend Gifts (Received), which may contain Kryptonian Probes, Kryptonian Sunstones, and other event items.

[New Feature: Base Skins]
 • After unlocking base skins, they can be applied from the profile by tapping the avatar.

[New Official Web Store Event: Limited-Time Rewards] (Available on April 13)
The event will launch simultaneously with [Lost Treasures of Krypton]. For details, check the [Champion Zone]. (The Champion Zone is currently unavailable on PC. Please use the official web store or access it via the mobile version.)
